show me monthly kWh consumption for siteid 447 in Gaborone from 2023 jan to 2023 jun

args.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', reading_date) AS month, SUM(kwh) AS total_kwh FROM energy_readings WHERE site_id=447 AND city='Gaborone' AND reading_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-06-30' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

🤔 how many kiloliters of blueberry wine were produced in Nuuk 2021-2022?

args.query: SELECT SUM(production_kl) FROM beverage_production WHERE city ILIKE '%Nuuk%' AND product_type ILIKE '%blueberry wine%' AND production_year BETWEEN 2021 AND 2022;

how many tickets were sold for the midnight movie in Nuuk on 2023-12-31

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_sales WHERE cinema_city='Nuuk' AND showtime='00:00:00' AND show_date='2023-12-31';

Find IPs that accessed the server from Bujumbura on 2023-12-31 23:59

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT ip_address FROM access_logs WHERE city = 'Bujumbura' AND access_time = '2023-12-31 23:59:00'

user: Which buses running route 13 in Tórshavn have wheelchair ramps that failed inspection after 2024 leap day?

args.query: SELECT bus_id FROM buses WHERE route_number = 13 AND city = 'Tórshavn' AND wheelchair_ramp_inspection = 'failed' AND inspection_date > '2024-02-29';

user: 111 microgallons (us) -> nanolitres
List every glacier in Svalbard that retreated more than 147 m between the 1957 and 2022 surveys.

args.query: SELECT glacier_name FROM glacier_surveys WHERE region = 'Svalbard' AND survey_year IN (1957, 2022) GROUP BY glacier_name HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN survey_year = 1957 THEN position_m ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN survey_year = 2022 THEN position_m ELSE 0 END) > 147;
